---
title: "IFCD0210 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd0210, backlog]
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: true
---

<style>

.heatMap th { background:  #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(3) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
th, td {
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

tr:hover {background-color:  #f4f4f4;}

</style>

![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

<div class="heatMap">

::: {.column-page-right}


##  ``Sprint#12: ApartmentPredictor Full-Architecture V`` (March 2026)

| # | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
|  **12**  | 42 | 02/03/2026 | - Sprint#12: ApartmentPredictor Full-Architecture V </br></br>  - React: </br> (1) Lab#02: ThinkInReact, `Amazon`  </br> (2) Lab#03: ThinkInReact, `eCommerce`    </br> (3) Lab#04: ThinkInReact, `real-state`   </br> (4) Lab#05: ThinkInReact, `thread-review`    </br> (5) Lab#09: ThinkInReact, `Timers`    </br>      | - [React Principles](/reactjs/reactjs-what-principles.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [Describing the UI](https://react.dev/learn/describing-the-ui){.external target='_blank'} </br>- [Adding Interactivity](https://react.dev/learn/adding-interactivity){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Managing state](https://react.dev/learn/managing-state){.external target='_blank'}     </br></br> - [Lab#02: ThinkInReact, Amazon](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/docs/PRA/Lab%2302_React_ThinkInReact.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Lab#03: ThinkInReact, eCommerce](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/docs/PRA/Lab%2303_React_ThinkInReact.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Lab#04: ThinkInReact, real-state](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/docs/PRA/Lab%2304_React_ThinkInReact.md){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Lab#05: ThinkInReact, thread-review](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/docs/PRA/Lab%2305_React_ThinkInReact.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Lab#06: ThinkInReact, timers](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/docs/PRA/Lab%2306_React_ThinkInReact.md){.external target='_blank'} |
|   | 43 | 03/03/2026 |  - React: </br>  (1) intro: Describing the UI: `.jsx` and what is a component  </br> (2) Hooks: `useState` and `useEffect`: with who is syncing / dependencies & return clean-up <br> (3) maps & ES6 & Manage state & render cycle </br>  (4) Forms & SPA CRUD operations for Apartment: `react Hook form` </br> (5) decoupled version with `custom hook` > Context  </br>  (6) Project management versions: `ApartmentPredictor-React_index.md` </br></br>    - `useReducer`: CRUD-Praga-4  </br>  - `useContext`: CRUD-Praga-5 </br> </br>    | - [React Principles](/reactjs/reactjs-what-principles.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [Describing the UI](https://react.dev/learn/describing-the-ui){.external target='_blank'} </br>- [Adding Interactivity](https://react.dev/learn/adding-interactivity){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Managing state](https://react.dev/learn/managing-state){.external target='_blank'}    </br> </br> - [Codesandbox: Praga CRUD-4 (reducer)](https://codesandbox.io/p/sandbox/strange-http-wgyf3n){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Codesandbox: Praga CRUD-5 (context)](https://codesandbox.io/p/devbox/task-crud-4-forked-f75f4n?workspaceId=ws_UM9jK6QFKQoLTL71feVrD1){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [Lab#02: React ThinkInReact](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/master/docs/PRA/Lab%2302_React_ThinkInReact.md){.external target='_blank'} |
|   |    | | |
|   | 44 | 05/03/2026 |   - React: </br>  (1) Project management versions: `ApartmentPredictor-React_index.md`: **v2** </br></br>   | - [ApartmentPredictor-React: xxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/xxxxxx){.external target='_blank'}</br>  </br></br>  |
|   | 45 | 06/03/2026 |  - React: </br>  (1) Project management versions: `ApartmentPredictor-React_index.md`: **v3** </br></br>   | - [ApartmentPredictor-React: xxxxx](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/xxxxxx){.external target='_blank'}</br>  </br></br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/ApartmentPredictor_v2.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br></br> - [mathsWeb: repo](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/mathsWeb){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [mathsWeb: deployed](https://mathswebspace.netlify.app/){.external target='_blank'}  |
: Backlog Sprint#12 March 2026 {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,55,39]"}
:::

</div>

::: {.callout-note}
- `---------` <s>topic pending</s>
- `-` topic done in class
- `++` new topic not planned
:::
